title: Infosys Completes Acquisition of Optimum Healthcare IT
detailed_summary: Infosys announced on May 5, 2026 that it completed the acquisition of Optimum Healthcare IT, a healthcare digital transformation and consulting firm focused on provider organizations. The acquisition follows Infosys's March 25, 2026 announcement and is intended to strengthen Infosys's healthcare capabilities, expand its provider-segment presence, add new clients and relationships, expand technology capabilities, and create synergies across new buying centers. The release did not disclose deal value, financial terms, or expected financial contribution.

key_facts.fact: Infosys completed the acquisition of Optimum Healthcare IT on May 5, 2026.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Completes Acquisition of Leading Healthcare Digital Transformation Company, Optimum Healthcare IT

key_facts.fact: The completed acquisition follows an announcement Infosys made on March 25, 2026.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Completes Acquisition of Leading Healthcare Digital Transformation Company, Optimum Healthcare IT

key_facts.fact: Infosys stated that Optimum Healthcare IT brings provider-domain expertise and a proven delivery model, making it a strategic fit for Infosys' healthcare growth strategy.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Completes Acquisition of Leading Healthcare Digital Transformation Company, Optimum Healthcare IT

key_facts.fact: Infosys stated the acquisition significantly enhances its presence in the provider segment by adding new clients and relationships, expanding technology capabilities, and creating synergies across new buying centers.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Completes Acquisition of Leading Healthcare Digital Transformation Company, Optimum Healthcare IT

key_facts.fact: Infosys said combining Optimum's provider experience with Infosys Topaz and Infosys Cobalt positions it to create a differentiated value proposition for healthcare providers.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Completes Acquisition of Leading Healthcare Digital Transformation Company, Optimum Healthcare IT

key_facts.fact: Optimum Healthcare IT is described as an Elite ServiceNow partner, a Premier AWS partner, a Workday Services partner, and a Microsoft Azure partner.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Completes Acquisition of Leading Healthcare Digital Transformation Company, Optimum Healthcare IT
